summary: Completed comprehensive testing of cash payment system implementation. All core cash payment functionality is working correctly including order creation, ticket reservation, admin approval/rejection workflow, and direct ticket assignment.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Server error 520 - Web server returning unknown error

passed_tests: Cash payment option appears in purchase modal
Cash payment is selected by default
Cash order creation with ticket reservation (48h expiry)
Cash orders backend API endpoints (create, get, validate, assign)
Ticket status updates from available to reserved to sold
Admin cash orders panel accessible via 'Pagos en Efectivo' tab
Integration between frontend and backend cash system
